name: api
description: API project for generating OpenAPI specifications and code for multiple services

scripts.specs:generate: rm -rf specs/ && tsp compile . --output-dir output/ && mv output/@typespec/openapi3 specs/ && rm -rf output/
scripts.api:generate: pnpm run api-client:generate && pnpm run api-server:generate && pnpm run api-ai:generate
scripts.api-client:generate: pnpm run api-client-communication:generate && pnpm run api-client-marketplace:generate && pnpm run api-client-student:generate
scripts.api-server:generate: pnpm run api-server-communication:generate && pnpm run api-server-marketplace:generate && pnpm run api-server-student:generate
scripts.api-client-communication:generate: openapi-generator-cli generate -i specs/openapi.Communication.v1.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o ../artifacts/client-web/app/.server/api/server-communication/generated && pnpm run api-client:add-ts-nocheck -- ../artifacts/client-web/app/.server/api/server-communication/generated
scripts.api-client-marketplace:generate: openapi-generator-cli generate -i specs/openapi.Marketplace.v1.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o ../artifacts/client-web/app/.server/api/server-marketplace/generated && pnpm run api-client:add-ts-nocheck -- ../artifacts/client-web/app/.server/api/server-marketplace/generated
scripts.api-client-student:generate: openapi-generator-cli generate -i specs/openapi.Student.v1.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o ../artifacts/client-web/app/.server/api/server-student/generated && pnpm run api-client:add-ts-nocheck -- ../artifacts/client-web/app/.server/api/server-student/generated
scripts.generate: pnpm run specs:generate && pnpm run api:generate

author: worksounourmachine
